<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the user-visible change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New filter / analytic on an existing surface
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor with no tool-surface change
- [ ] Surface change (new tool, resource, prompt, env var, or breaking schema change) - opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` (type-check) passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `Unreleased` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] Updated `README.md` (tool tables, counts, config) if the surface changed
- [ ] No real hostnames, IP addresses, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths in code, tests, fixtures, or this PR (use 192.0.2.x and generic names; the content-guard check will fail otherwise)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified above)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
